content:
Web-public channel created by Sonia Barbosa. Description:

The Dataverse Project has been testing TK Labels support in our demo environment. We are reaching out for additional testers here. Details on testing and leaving feedback on the feature will be described here.
Sonia Barbosa renamed channel TK Labels feature to TK Labels.
Sonia Barbosa renamed channel TK Labels to Indigenous Data Support and Local Contexts.

Sonia Barbosa changed the description for this channel.

  • Old description:

The Dataverse Project has been testing TK Labels support in our demo environment. We are reaching out for additional testers here. Details on testing and leaving feedback on the feature will be described here.

  • New description:

Supporting traditional knowledge labels via integration between Dataverse and Local Contexts
Philip Durbin 🚀 renamed channel Indigenous Data Support and Local Contexts to localcontexts.
